title: All Mobs Challenge
description: Try to kill all Minecraft mobs as quickly as possible!
body:
# All Mobs Challenge Mod
An exciting Minecraft challenge mod for Fabric 1.21.11 where the goal is to defeat **all mobs available in vanilla survival** in a random order.
## Features

- **Server-Side Only**: The mod only needs to be installed on the server. Clients do not need the mod.

- **Synchronized Progress**: All players on the server work together on the same challenge.

- **Real-Time Stats**: A boss bar at the top of the screen always displays the current objective.

- **Progress Saving**: The challenge status is automatically saved and is retained even after a server restart.

- **Strict Vanilla Filter**: The list only includes mobs that are actually reachable in normal survival mode (no Giants, no Illusioners, no Armor Stands).

## Commands
All commands begin with `/allmobs`.

| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- | 
| `/allmobs start` | Starts the challenge or activates it from paused mode. |
| `/allmobs stop` | Pauses the challenge completely. The boss bar is hidden and the mod is deactivated. |
| `/allmobs resume` | Resumes a paused challenge from the same point. |
| `/allmobs skip` | Skips the current mob if it is impossible to reach. |
| `/allmobs reset` | Resets the entire challenge and generates a new random order for all mobs. |

## Installation

1. Download the `.jar` file of the mod.

2. Move it to the `mods` folder of your Fabric 1.21.11 server.

3. Restart the server.

4. Use `/allmobs start` to start the game!

## Requirements

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.11

- **Fabric Loader & API**
